### Problem Description
patched placeholder

### Your Incorrect Code
```cpp
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;
using ll=long long;
using Graph = vector<vector<int>>;

#define rep(i,n) for (int i=0; i<(n); ++i)
#define reps(i,n) for (int i=0; i<=(n); ++i)
#define all(x) (x).begin(), (x).end()
#define rall(x) (x).rbegin(), (x).rend()
#define pb(a) push_back(a)
#define Yes(b) cout << ((b)?"Yes":"No") << endl
#define YES(b) cout << ((b)?"YES":"NO") << endl

int dx[4]={1,0,-1,0};
int dy[4]={0,1,0,-1};

int main(){
    int N;
    cin >> N;
    vector<ll> P(N+1), X(N);
    P[0] = 0;
    rep(i, N) cin >> X[i];
    rep(i, N){
        int p;
        cin >> p;
        P[i+1] = P[i] + p;
    }
    map<int, int> x_to_ptr;
    rep(i, N){
        x_to_ptr.emplace(X[i], i);
    }
    // for (const auto& [k, v] : x_to_ptr){
    //     cout << "X_i is " << k << " and i is " << v << endl;
    // }

    int Q;
    cin >> Q;
    rep(q, Q){
        int L, R, l, r;
        cin >> L >> R;
        auto X_l = x_to_ptr.lower_bound(L);
        auto X_r = x_to_ptr.upper_bound(R);
        if (X_l==x_to_ptr.end()){
            l = N;
        }else{
            l = (*X_l).second;
        }
        if (X_r==x_to_ptr.end()){
            r = N;
        }else{
            r = (*X_r).second;
        }
        // cout << "X_l is " << (*X_l).first << " and X_r is " << (*X_r).first << endl;
        // cout << "l is " << l << " and r is " << r << endl;
        int ans = P[r] - P[l];
        cout << ans << endl;
    }
}
```

### Failing Case #1
Input:

### Your Task
Fix the C++ code to pass ALL test cases (including hidden ones).

### Critical Guidelines
1. Focus on algorithmic correctness - NO hard-coded values or special cases
2. Ensure proper data structures and complexity (aim for O(N log N) or better when possible)
3. Handle edge cases (empty input, single elements, max constraints)
4. Use standard C++20 features; avoid non-portable code

### Output Format
Provide ONLY the complete fixed C++ code in a single ```cpp block.
